blocks.description: Program header comments, LIBNAME definitions for raw, staging, and target experiment schemas, OPTIONS statement

DATA step defining test/control groups from assignment log: validates group codes, computes days since exposure, enforces 14-day observation window, flags conversions with days-to-convert, and handles revenue attribution
PROC MEANS computing group-level summary statistics: sample size, conversion rate, average revenue, standard deviations, and standard errors by test/control group
PROC TTEST performing two-sample t-tests for statistical significance on conversion and revenue metrics between test and control groups with ODS output capture
PROC SQL computing conversion and revenue lift percentages versus control group, with 95% confidence interval bounds for the conversion rate difference using pooled standard errors

DATA step determining experiment outcome: merges lift analysis with t-test p-values, flags TEST_WINS/CONTROL_WINS/INCONCLUSIVE, assigns LAUNCH/REVERT/EXTEND_OR_STOP decision, and computes minimum detectable effect (MDE) for the sample size
DATA step generating experiment conclusion report as name-value pairs: outputs conversion lift, revenue lift, sample size, MDE, and final decision metrics with descriptive conclusion text
